content.en:
For an Ultimate Extreme Superior like the Doomsday Extreme Venerable, even if the entire Ultimate Land was destroyed, it would have no effect on him.

When they reached the realm of the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, they were already completely at ease.

And at the moment.

Ye Tian and they have already come to the third round of the exam~ audit.

And the third round of assessment is still cruel, and it is still the style of the doomsday extreme.

......

In the third round.

Ye Tian and other ancient-level Ultimate Realm Masters have all come here, and they must comprehend an ultimate secret method at a specified time in the third round of assessment, and if they fail, it will still be an order to be obliterated.

But if you succeed in understanding, you have the hope of surviving, and you can choose to leave, or you can choose to participate in the fourth and final round of assessment.

Airplanes!!!!!

A huge stone monument emerges.

Many Ancient Ultimate Realm Masters obtained this Ultimate Secret Method from this stone tablet, but this Ultimate Secret Method was too obscure and difficult to understand, and all the Ultimate Realm Masters frowned.

The time given in the third round of assessment is 10,000 Ultimate Eras, and if you can't comprehend success within 10,000 Ultimate Eras, you will be wiped out.

"The Ultimate Secret Method—The End!"

After Ye Tian's comprehension, he found that this ultimate secret method was a very extreme ultimate secret method, which focused on putting the ultimate will to death and then rebirth, but to let the ultimate will experience annihilation and rebirth.

Of course, if there is a slight mistake, it will really fall and die.

If you want to comprehend the secret method of the end, it is equivalent to practice, if you don't practice the secret method of driving, how can you be considered to comprehend?

But who dares to practice? Once you fail, you will die.

"If you fail once, you have to die, which means you must practice once!"

Ye Tian took a look at the other Ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lords, and they were all very distressed.

"Most of the Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Masters here have to die!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He no longer looked at anyone else, but devoted himself to the ultimate secret method.

In any case, first comprehend the essence of this ultimate secret method, and then go to cultivation.

In the years that followed, he continued to study and comprehend, using various treasures to deduce, and even tried to derive with external replica bodies.

Before you know it, five thousand years of the ultimate era have passed.

In the past few years, he has devoted himself to studying the Secret Method of the End, and he has almost studied this Secret Method of the End.

However, he still had to wait for his research to be more thorough before cultivating the Ultimate Secret Method, and the other Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Masters also thought the same.

Before you know it, another period of time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian began to cultivate the Secret Method of the End, but instead of cultivating in the Land of the Inheritance of the Doomsday Extreme Venerable, he cultivated in the Sea of Dimensions.

It is impossible for the Doomsday Supreme Venerable to keep an eye on this place, even if the cultivation fails, it should not affect this assessment.

Thereupon.

He began to cultivate the Secret Method of the End.

Ye Tian thought that his understanding of the Ultimate Secret Method had reached an extremely deep level, and this cultivation was still very serious, and he did not dare to relax in the slightest.

I saw an invisible prison accompanied by the final secret method, directly gathered his ultimate will, and then began to compress and temper.

Pain!

Ye Tian felt as if this copy body was about to collapse, but he still had to hold on.

I don't know how long it took, but suddenly the pain dissipated, and the ultimate will completed its transformation.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian found that a small terminal prison appeared in the depths of the ultimate will, and this terminal prison could continuously absorb the ultimate will, and then refine the ultimate will, so that the ultimate will could continue to improve.

This kind of ascension works very well, even better than the effect of the Ultimate Hell Stone.

And this is just the introduction to the Ultimate Secret Method, if you continue to improve, the effect will be even better, and there is no difficulty at all in upgrading the Ultimate Will into the Ultimate Will.

"It is worthy of the inheritance of the ultimate supreme!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian used the duplicate body to try to cultivate the Ultimate Secret Method again and again, and his proficiency in this Terminal Secret Method became higher and higher, and it was almost impossible to fail again.

......

The third level of assessment.

Ye Tian's duplicate body naturally also cultivated the Ultimate Secret Method, and successfully practiced it.

[Congratulations on passing the third level of assessment.] 】

Do you want to participate in the fourth round of assessment?

Ye Tian hesitated for a moment, and finally chose to participate in the fourth round of assessment.

Immediately, he was waiting.

Seeing this, the other Ancient Ultimate Realm Masters showed envy one by one.

"Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable has practiced the ultimate secret method, and he didn't leave, it seems that he wants to participate in the fourth round of assessment. "

Some of the Ancient Ultimate Realm Lord Secret Paths.

After another period of time, there were finally other Ultimate Realm Masters who began to cultivate the Ultimate Secret Method.

Rumble!!!!!

An ancient-level Ultimate Realm Master failed to cultivate the Ultimate Secret Method, and the Ultimate Will was shattered, completely falling and dying, turning into a corpse, and then being absorbed by the Ultimate Land.

Next, one after another Ancient Ultimate Realm Lords fell, becoming the nourishment of the Ultimate Land.

Of course, there are also ancient-level Ultimate Realm Masters who succeeded by luck, completed the cultivation of the Ultimate Secret Method, and successfully survived.

After some of them successfully cultivated, they chose to participate in the fourth round of assessment, but some directly chose to give up, so that at least they would not die, and they would have a final secret method in vain.

"I give up!"

Xuan Ze Jizun immediately said.

Airplanes!

Xuanze Jizun was immediately moved out.

......

Outside the Land of the Ultimate Supreme Inheritance.

The figure of Xuan Ze Extreme Venerable appeared, and suddenly some Eternal Ultimate Realm Lords and some Ancient Ultimate Realm Masters who did not enter came over and asked about the situation inside.

"Most of them died, I passed the third round, but I didn't dare to go to the fourth round. Xuan Ze Jizun said.

He was also glad that he had obtained the Secret Method of the End, and was about to go back to cultivate the Secret Method of the End.

Suddenly, the memories of the secret method of the end were being erased in my mind.

"No!"

This is a secret method that he has worked so hard to obtain, and it has been erased.

In fact, the moment he was removed, he was erased by the means used by the Doomsday Extremity to erase his memory of the secret method of the end, even if he had many clones, it was useless, and all memories would be erased.

Ultimately.

Xuan Ze Jizun's memory of the secret method of the end is all gone, and he can't remember anything at all.

"It's a big loss!"

Xuan Ze extremely respected the secret way.

He couldn't help but secretly feel that the Doomsday Extreme Venerable was too ruthless, and he didn't give any benefit at all.

No, it also gave a little benefit, that is, after the success of cultivating the Ultimate Secret Method, the Ultimate Will skyrocketed, and the Ultimate Will that also skyrocketed was not erased.

That's the only benefit!.
